title: tectaria phaeocaulos
intro: Tectaria phaeocaulos, also known as the golden shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. The health benefits of Tectaria phaeocaulos include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
